title: craspedaria nummularia
intro: Craspedaria nummularia, also known as coin leaf or craspedaria, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Craspedaria nummularia include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
